arts.ttl: Ipswich 2-4 Nottingham Forest: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Nuno Espirito Santo closes in on Arsenal
arts.sum: Anthony Elanga bags a brace as Nottingham Forest move to within one point of second-placed Arsenal in the Premier League table with a 4-2 win over Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: 'Chelsea win round one but Man City retain belief'
arts.sum: In the first of a four-game battle, it was Chelsea who came out on top against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Chelsea set to cut one player from the squad vs Arsenal as Enzo Maresca left no choice
arts.sum: Mathis Amougou has been used as backup to the backup so far, meaning he is surely set to have an even more reduced role to come, whilst Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall is almost at Conference League only minutes. Chelsea's Conference League squad has been the source of great rotation and therefore the figures are somewhat bloated.

arts.ttl: Back to Man Utd? Chelsea reveal stance on permanent Sancho transfer
arts.sum: However, according to Ben Jacobs, Chelsea are expected to complete the purchase of Sancho and all parties appear content with the deal that was negotiated last summer. Chelsea will not send Jadon Sancho back to Manchester United this summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: What David Luiz admitted in 2019 about his transfer from Chelsea to Arsenal, ‘I couldn’t miss out’…
arts.sum: Brazilian defender David Luiz is one of numerous high-profile players to represent both Chelsea and Arsenal in his career. On Sunday afternoon, Chelsea travel to...

arts.ttl: Arteta expected Chelsea to be title 'contenders'
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says he expected Chelsea to be "contenders" to win the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Joleon Lescott says £40m Chelsea player wouldn’t be a starter if Antonio Conte was still manager
arts.sum: Antonio Conte is one of the greatest managers Chelsea have had in the modern era. For all of his flaws, Antonio Conte led Chelsea to...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes surprise Premier League title 'contenders' admission before Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has been full of praise for Chelsea and their manager Enzo Maresca.

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree deal with Las Palmas talent
arts.sum: A temporary member of the midfield ranks at La Liga outfit Las Palmas is inching towards a move to England with big-spending Chelsea this summer. That’s according to transfer insider…

arts.ttl: Man Utd could ruin Arsenal Nico Williams transfer with £60m swoop
arts.sum: Arsenal seemingly will face an uphill battle, despite Arteta's desire to sign Williams, who reportedly wants to stay in Spain and is said to be keen on a move to Catalonia. Last summer, when Williams was also linked with a move to both Arsenal and Barcelona, he revealed: "It's always good to hear things from the outside, it means I'm doing my job well.
